post.description:
Generate JWT token for development/testing (disabled in production).

This endpoint allows developers to easily generate valid JWT tokens for testing
the API without needing to set up a full authentication infrastructure.

**IMPORTANT**: This endpoint is only available when ENVIRONMENT != "production"

Args:
    request: Token generation parameters (user_id, org, roles)
    
Returns:
    JWT token and metadata
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: 403 if called in production environment

get.description:
Get statistics for the current user's session.

Session is automatically identified from JWT token via middleware.

Returns:
    Session statistics including TTL remaining, document count, etc.
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if session not found

delete.description:
Delete the current user's session and all associated data.

This allows users to explicitly clean up their data before TTL expiration
(privacy feature: "forget my data now").

Session is automatically identified from JWT token via middleware.

Returns:
    Confirmation of deletion

post.description:
Upload a document to the session for answer suggestions.

Session is automatically identified from JWT token via middleware.

Args:
    file: Document file (PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD)
    
Returns:
    Upload confirmation with metadata
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: 400 if file invalid, 404 if session not found

Generate answer suggestion based on uploaded documents.

Session is automatically identified from JWT token via middleware.

Args:
    suggest_request: Question and optional context
    
Returns:
    Answer with citations
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: 400 if invalid, 404 if no documents, 500 if LLM error

Generate answer suggestions for multiple questionnaire items.

Accepts a QTI-inspired JSON payload with sections (grouped) or a flat
item list. Items within the same section share context, improving
suggestion quality for related questions.

Session is automatically identified from JWT token via middleware.

Args:
    batch_request: Assessment payload with sections or items

Returns:
    Structured suggestions per item with citations and reasoning

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if session not found, 500 if LLM error

get.description:
Retrieve session audit report.

Session is automatically identified from JWT token via middleware.

Args:
    format: Response format ('json' or 'plaintext')
    
Returns:
    Audit report in requested format
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if session not found

Return privacy and GDPR disclosure statement.

Returns:
    Plaintext privacy statement

id.title: Id
id.description: Choice identifier, echoed back in selected_id

BatchChoice.title: BatchChoice
BatchChoice.description: A selectable choice within a question.

id.title: Id
id.description: Item identifier, echoed back in response

choices.title: Choices
choices.description: Predefined choices (required for single_choice and multiple_choice types)

BatchSuggestItem.title: BatchSuggestItem
BatchSuggestItem.description: A single questionnaire item in a batch suggest request.

assessment_id.title: Assessment Id
assessment_id.description: Caller-supplied assessment identifier, echoed in response

context.title: Context
context.description: Optional assessment-level context for the LLM

sections.title: Sections
sections.description: Grouped items (use this or items, not both)

items.title: Items
items.description: Flat item list (normalized to single implicit section)

BatchSuggestRequest.title: BatchSuggestRequest
BatchSuggestRequest.description:
Request for batch answer suggestions.

Accepts either a structured `sections` list or a flat `items` list.
Flat items are normalized to a single implicit section internally.

Examples:
    >>> # Sectioned input
    >>> req = BatchSuggestRequest(
    ...     assessment_id="gdpr-2026",
    ...     sections=[BatchSuggestSection(id="s1", title="Data Retention", items=[...])]
    ... )
    >>> # Flat input
    >>> req = BatchSuggestRequest(
    ...     assessment_id="quick-check",
    ...     items=[BatchSuggestItem(id="q1", type="open_ended", prompt="...")]
    ... )

BatchSuggestResponse.title: BatchSuggestResponse
BatchSuggestResponse.description: Response for a batch suggest request.

title.title: Title
title.description: Section title, used as LLM context

BatchSuggestSection.title: BatchSuggestSection
BatchSuggestSection.description: A group of related questionnaire items sharing context.

excerpt.title: Excerpt
excerpt.description: Exact text excerpt from the source (W3C TextQuoteSelector pattern)

CitationResult.title: CitationResult
CitationResult.description: A citation linking a suggestion to a source document fragment.

suggestion.title: Suggestion
suggestion.description: Human-readable answer, safe to display directly

selected_id.title: Selected Id
selected_id.description: Matched choice id for single_choice (null if uncertain)

selected_ids.title: Selected Ids
selected_ids.description: Matched choice ids for multiple_choice (null if uncertain)

reasoning.title: Reasoning
reasoning.description: LLM explanation of confidence, source interpretation, or uncertainty
